interface.longDescription:
Jimdo builds your professional small business website directly from what you've already discussed with ChatGPT, no templates, no design work, no starting from scratch. Your conversation becomes your content. Get a complete website in minutes, then publish it or take it to Jimdo's AI-powered growth platform including domain registration, booking systems, local search optimization, and strategic guidance to grow your business online.

Try prompts like:
-  "Jimdo, create a photography website for my business"
-  "Jimdo, build me a website based on what we discussed"
-  "Jimdo, turn this into a professional site"

Jimdo uses your conversation context to generate relevant content and professional design tailored to your specific business. Trusted by over 32 million websites since 2007.
defaultPrompt: A website for my photography business
